name: pr-review
description: Manual PR review trigger for the Antigravity CLI. Run 'antigravity pr-review <repo> <pr-number>' to instantly trigger an AI-powered code review on any GitHub PR without waiting for a webhook event.
author: Shweta Ghanwat

pr-review.description: Trigger an AI code review on a GitHub PR

flags.--no-chat: Skip Google Chat notification (review still posts to GitHub)
flags.--dry-run: Print the review to terminal only — do not post to GitHub or Chat
